stories.headline: PJM outlines 3 paths to market reform
stories.summary: PJM laid out three reform tracks — capacity-market design, interconnection queue, and demand-response treatment — as it confronts pressure after consecutive auctions cleared at the FERC ceiling, with Western Hub at $23.77/MWh and load forecast at 86.3 GW today.

stories.headline: Eversource CEO: 'We are resisting data centers'
stories.summary: Eversource's chief executive told Q1 investors the utility is pushing back on hyperscaler load requests rather than chasing growth, a sharp counterpoint to PJM peers booking 8%+ data center sales lifts.

stories.headline: Evergy projects up to 8% annual retail sales growth from data center load
stories.summary: Evergy raised its long-term sales-growth outlook to as much as 8% per year on hyperscaler commitments in Kansas and Missouri, signaling the load surge PJM utilities are also booking into IRPs.

stories.headline: Exelon shifts capex from distribution to transmission, cites affordability
stories.summary: Exelon trimmed planned utility spending and reallocated dollars to transmission to soften retail rate increases, with management citing customer affordability as the driver across PECO, ComEd, BGE, ACE, Pepco, and Delmarva.

stories.headline: PJM says it will have enough generation for summer peak
stories.summary: PJM's summer outlook projects sufficient capacity to meet expected peak demand across the 13-state footprint, with the RTO citing committed resources and demand response after a tight 25/26 delivery year.

stories.headline: McCormick pitches federal permit reform after Homer City data center update
stories.summary: Sen. Dave McCormick toured the Homer City gas-fired redevelopment and is sponsoring legislation to force water-permit decisions within one year, cap court challenges, and extend nuclear licenses from 40 to 60 years.

stories.headline: PA Senate votes to end vehicle emissions inspections
stories.summary: The PA Senate passed a bill ending the state's emissions-inspection program for non-commercial vehicles in a regional split, with Philadelphia and Pittsburgh-area lawmakers largely opposed; the bill heads to the House.

stories.headline: PA-7 Dem primary: Brooks consolidates establishment support against Mackenzie
stories.summary: Bethlehem firefighter and state firefighters' union president Bob Brooks has locked up the bulk of national and Lehigh Valley Democratic backing in the May 19 primary to challenge Rep. Ryan Mackenzie.

stories.headline: Fetterman: 'I haven't changed' — pens op-ed denying party switch
stories.summary: Sen. John Fetterman wrote a personal op-ed insisting he has no plans to leave the Democratic Party, even as his cross-aisle friendships and breaks with Senate Democrats deepen ahead of November.

stories.headline: Trump's $1B ballroom security request stalling on the Hill
stories.summary: House and Senate Republicans are privately telling leadership the $1B for White House ballroom security is too politically toxic to ride in the immigration reconciliation bill, with Speaker Johnson's two-vote margin shrinking.

stories.headline: Federal trade court rules Trump's post-SCOTUS 10% global tariff illegal
stories.summary: A federal trade court found the administration's fallback justification for a 10% across-the-board tariff unlawful, declining nationwide relief but giving importers precedent to fight collections in individual cases.

stories.headline: GOP redistricting push: Tennessee enacts new map, South Carolina and Louisiana next
stories.summary: Tennessee's legislature carved up Rep. Steve Cohen's Memphis district Thursday; South Carolina House panels take up a map erasing Rep. Jim Clyburn's seat today, while Louisiana opens a public comment window.

stories.headline: GOP frets over midterm message as Trump focuses on Iran, ballroom
stories.summary: Republican strategists and House Conference Chair Lisa McClain say the White House lacks a coherent affordability/economy pitch heading into 2026, with Iran, redistricting, and intra-party fights dominating the airtime.

stories.headline: Skenes shuts down D-backs as Pirates take rubber game 1-0
stories.summary: Paul Skenes worked a dominant start at Chase Field and Brandon Lowe's solo homer was the only run as the Pirates (21-17) beat Arizona 1-0 Thursday afternoon; series at San Francisco opens tonight.

stories.headline: Penguins extend Dewar and Solovyov to open offseason
stories.summary: Pittsburgh re-signed forward Connor Dewar at $2.25M AAV through 2027-28 and defenseman Ilya Solovyov to a one-year, $850K deal, locking in two depth pieces before the UFA market opens.

stories.headline: Steelers open rookie minicamp today; Rodgers expected to re-sign this weekend
stories.summary: The 2026 draft class — headlined by QB Drew Allar — reports to UPMC Rooney Sports Complex for rookie minicamp Friday, while reporting indicates Aaron Rodgers will re-up with Pittsburgh in the next 48 hours.
